entities.name: INTEGRATED SYSTEMS APPROACH
entities.description: A holistic approach used to design resilient farming systems and improve livelihoods in drylands

entities.name: RESILIENCE
entities.description: The ability of farming systems to withstand and recover from shocks in arid environments

entities.name: ARID FARMING SYSTEMS
entities.description: Farming systems located in dry regions characterized by low rainfall and vulnerability

entities.name: SOUTH ASIA
entities.description: The geographic region where the study was conducted

entities.name: DRYLANDS
entities.description: Arid or semi-arid regions with limited water availability

entities.name: WESTERN RAJASTHAN
entities.description: The specific region in India including Jodhpur, Barmer, and Jaisalmer districts where the study took place

entities.name: INDIA
entities.description: The country where the study was conducted

entities.name: LIVELIHOOD STRATEGIES
entities.description: Approaches adopted by smallholder farmers to sustain their living standards based on opportunities and constraints

entities.name: AGRICULTURAL MANAGEMENT PRACTICES
entities.description: Techniques used by farmers to manage their crops and land in dryland systems

entities.name: HOUSEHOLD SURVEY
entities.description: A data collection tool used to capture socio-economic and agroecological variables

entities.name: STATISTICAL APPROACH
entities.description: Analytical methods used to categorize households into homogenous farm types

entities.name: LIVELIHOOD ASSETS
entities.description: Resources available to households that determine land use patterns and management practices

entities.name: FARM TYPES
entities.description: Homogenous categories of farms based on the diversity of livelihood assets

entities.name: FOCUS GROUP DISCUSSIONS
entities.description: Qualitative method used to validate farm typologies and prioritize interventions

entities.name: INNOVATION PLATFORM
entities.description: A collaborative mechanism for identifying and prioritizing potential innovation options at the district level

entities.name: ON-FARM ASSESSMENT
entities.description: The process of testing and evaluating farm-type specific interventions directly on farms

entities.name: VILLAGE DEVELOPMENT COMMITTEE
entities.description: A community-level body used to prioritize landscape and community options

entities.name: INSTITUTIONAL PLATFORMS
entities.description: Frameworks established from village to regional levels to strengthen community capacity to innovate

entities.name: FARMING SYSTEMS PRODUCTIVITY
entities.description: The measure of output efficiency and yield of the farming systems

entities.name: HOUSEHOLD INCOME
entities.description: The total earnings and economic viability of the farm households

entities.name: VALUE CHAINS
entities.description: The process of adding value to agricultural products from production to consumption

entities.name: SUSTAINABLE MANAGEMENT OF NATURAL RESOURCE
entities.description: The practice of using natural resources, including common pastures, in a way that ensures long-term availability

entities.name: RESEARCH FOR DEVELOPMENT
entities.description: An approach to research aimed at creating practical improvements for resource-poor farmers in vulnerable regions

entities.name: SUSTAINABLE INTENSIFICATION
entities.description: Increasing agricultural productivity while reducing environmental impact
